subcodes.first_line: The Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing beareth witness unto Him Who hath appeared in the Kingdom of creation that, verily, there is none other God beside Him, Who hath ever been sanctified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهدت سدره المنتهی لمن ظهر فی ملکوت الانشاء بانه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @knowledge; recognition of God, @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @exhortations and counsels
